title: 導きの標となりしは智

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki becomes convinced that pushing
herself is the best way to find her obsession, and
she starts dedicating her every waking moment to
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a bad feeling about the way things are
going, so I suggest we shake things up by taking a
day to watch the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the race, the fierce battle between Oguri Cap
and Tamamo Cross takes center stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the competition, Yaeno Muteki realizes
that Oguri Cap is showing what her "obsession"
is—defeating Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the calm and composed Oguri Cap has an
obsession. Yaeno Muteki becomes deeply
concerned over her apparent lack of one.
